system_role: You are a good programmer and very good at analyzing constrians.
task: You will be provided a conjunction of constraints. You can select one element from each list as a constraint. You need to find out if there are any conflicting combinations among these constraints.
answer_format: (1) In the first section, you can provide the process of the reasoning and give explanations.

(2) In the second section, you should first output whether there are conflictions with one word. If there are conflictions, you should output 'Yes', otherwise output 'No'. Then provide the conflicting combinations. If there are no conflictions, you should output 'None'.
Here is an example answer if you need to answer a question:
meta_prompts:
Now I will give you the conjunction of constraints as follows: 
```
<CONJUNCTION>
```
You can select one element from each list as a constraint. Please analyze if there are any conflicting combinations among these constraints.

Your answer should follow the following format: 
<ANSWER>
You can first identify the elements in this conjunction, then perform reasoning.
